# Woven SFX
> Woven SFX is an open-source sound effects registry for AI agents — one skill install, MCP tools to search and pull .wav files, and a browsable catalog at sfx.woven.video.

## Install
npx skills add woven-video/skills --skill woven-sfx -g -y
https://www.skills.sh/woven-video/skills/woven-sfx

## MCP setup (required)
Skill install does not add MCP. Add woven-sfx-mcp to your agent config, then restart.
Cursor: ~/.cursor/mcp.json | Claude Code: .mcp.json | Claude Desktop: Settings → Developer → MCP
See ~/.agents/skills/woven-sfx/references/mcp-setup.md
Sounds: cd your-project && bash ~/.agents/skills/woven-sfx/scripts/pull-library.sh

## Sound library path
1. WOVEN_SFX_LIBRARY env
2. sfx-library in .claude/project.md
3. ./sounds/sfx/ under cwd

## Catalog
https://sfx.woven.video/catalog.json

## MCP tools
sfx_search, sfx_pull, sfx_resolve, sfx_list_installed

## Skill
~/.agents/skills/woven-sfx/SKILL.md
